title: Annual Rotaract Summit
description: A comprehensive summit bringing together leaders from across Rotaract clubs to discuss service projects and leadership development.

title: Community Cleanup Drive
description: Join us in making a difference by cleaning up our local community and promoting environmental awareness.

title: Youth Leadership Workshop
description: Develop essential leadership skills through interactive workshops conducted by industry professionals.

title: Educational Support Program
description: Providing tuitions and educational support to underprivileged students in the community.

title: Fundraiser Gala Night
description: An elegant evening to raise funds for our upcoming community projects with entertainment and networking.

title: Inter-Club Sports Tournament
description: A fun-filled sports competition between Rotaract clubs promoting fitness and camaraderie.
